cta.title: Ready to Build Trust On-Chain?
cta.desc: Connect your Freighter wallet and create your first escrow in minutes.

create.title: Create Escrow
create.desc: Client locks funds and defines project milestones.

deliver.title: Deliver Work
deliver.desc: Freelancer works, then submits each milestone for review.

release.title: Release Funds
release.desc: Client approves, funds release automatically. Reputation updated.

lock.title: Milestone-Based Locking
lock.desc: Funds are locked on-chain and only released when you approve each milestone. No trust required.

rep.title: On-Chain Reputation
rep.desc: Every completed escrow builds your permanent, verifiable reputation score on the Stellar blockchain.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.desc: If issues arise, a trusted arbiter or the contract admin can fairly distribute locked funds.

decentralized.title: Fully Decentralized
decentralized.desc: No intermediaries, no custody. All logic lives in a Soroban smart contract — open and auditable.
